info.title: Microsoft HorizonDb Management API
info.description: Azure Resource Provider API for managing HorizonDb clusters, pools, replicas, and firewall rules

get.description: List the operations for the provider
Lists all HorizonDb clusters in a subscription.
Lists all HorizonDb parameter groups in a subscription.
Lists all HorizonDb clusters in a resource group.
Gets information about a HorizonDb cluster.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster.

put.description: Creates a new HorizonDb cluster or updates an existing cluster.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource create parameters.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Updates an existing HorizonDb cluster (e.g., tags, virtual cores, replica count).

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the HorizonDb cluster.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Azure.Core.azureLocation.description: Represents an Azure geography region where supported resource providers live.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.
The properties that can be updated for a HorizonDb cluster.

HorizonDBClusterParameterGroupConnection.description: Connection information for HorizonDb parameter group.

id.description: The resource ID of the connected parameter group.

syncStatus.description: Indication of if parameter group is applied on HorizonDb resource.

applyImmediately.description: Indicates whether the parameters should be applied immediately.

version.description: The version of the HorizonDb cluster.

createMode.description: The mode to create a new HorizonDb cluster.

pointInTimeUTC.description: Restore point creation time specifying the time to restore from.

sourceClusterResourceId.description: The source cluster resource ID for restore or replica creation.

poolName.description: The pool name for restore or replica operations.

processorType.description: The processor type for the HorizonDb cluster.

fullyQualifiedDomainName.description: The fully qualified domain name of the cluster.

readonlyEndpoint.description: The fully qualified domain name used for readonly endpoint for the cluster.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cluster.

zonePlacementPolicy.description: Defines how replicas are placed across availability zones.

parameterGroup.description: Defines connection to a parameter group.

HorizonDBClusterPropertiesForPatchUpdate.description: Properties of a HorizonDb cluster for update operations.

parameterGroup.description: Defines connection to a parameter group.

HorizonDBCreateModeCluster.description: The mode to create a new HorizonDb cluster.

HorizonDBCreateModePool.description: The mode to create a new HorizonDb cluster.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

HorizonDBFirewallRuleProperties.description: Properties of a HorizonDb firewall rule.

startIpAddress.description: The start IP address of the firewall rule (IPv4).

endIpAddress.description: The end IP address of the firewall rule (IPv4).

description.description: The description of the HorizonDb firewall rule.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the firewall rule.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the parameter group.

HorizonDBParameterGroupPropertiesForPatc.description: Properties of a HorizonDb parameter group for update operations.

parameters.description: Parameters in the parameter group.

applyImmediately.description: Indicates whether the parameters should be applied immediately.

dataType.description: The data type of the parameter.

allowedValues.description: The allowed values for the parameter.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the parameter.
